channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ASAL] Automotive Stampings Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Automotive Stampings and Assemblies Ltd has announced the approval of its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, during a Board of Directors meeting held on April 25, 2026. The financial results have received an unmodified opinion from the statutory auditors, BSR & Co. LLP. Additionally, the board approved the re-appointment of M/s. Harshad S Deshpande and Associates as Cost Auditors and M/s. Ernst & Young LLP as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the Board on April 25, 2026.
  • BSR & Co. LLP issued an unmodified audit opinion on the financial results.
  • Harshad S Deshpande & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditors for FY26-27.
  • Ernst & Young LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY26-27.
  • Financial results and auditor's report are available on the company website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUTOMOTIVE STAMPINGS & ASSEMBLIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ASAL] Automotive Stampings Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
Automotive Stampings and Assemblies Ltd has announced the approval of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, during a Board Meeting held on April 25, 2026. The financial results, accompanied by an unmodified audit report from BSR & Co. LLP, have been taken on record. The board also approved the re-appointment of M/s. Harshad S Deshpande and Associates as Cost Auditors and M/s. Ernst & Young LLP as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the Board on April 25, 2026.
  • BSR & Co. LLP issued an unmodified audit opinion on the FY26 financial results.
  • Harshad S Deshpande & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditors for FY27.
  • Ernst & Young LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.
  • Results and auditor's report are available on the company website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AUTOMOTIVE STAMPINGS & ASSEMBLIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LOVABLE] Lovable Lingerie Responds to Price Movement Query
item.description:
Lovable Lingerie Ltd clarified that the recent price movement in its stock is purely market-driven. The company stated that it is unaware of any undisclosed material information that could have influenced the trading activity. Lovable Lingerie affirmed its commitment to complying with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and will continue to make timely disclosures of all material events and information.

  • Lovable Lingerie addresses exchange's query on price fluctuations.
  • Company states no undisclosed information impacting stock price.
  • Price movement attributed to market dynamics.
  • Lovable Lingerie commits to SEBI (LODR) compliance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LOVABLE LINGERIE LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [TTIL] Tirupati Innovar: Bharat Sakariya Resigns as Director
item.description:
Tirupati Innovar Ltd's board of directors accepted the resignation of Mr. Bharat Babubhai Sakariya (DIN: 10849027) from the post of Additional Non-Executive Independent Director, effective April 25, 2026. Mr. Sakariya cited his inability to devote sufficient time to the company's affairs as the reason for his resignation. He also confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation. The board meeting, which commenced at 02:00 P.M., concluded at 2:30 P.M.

  • Bharat Babubhai Sakariya resigned as Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Resignation is effective from April 25, 2026.
  • Sakariya cited time constraints as the reason for his resignation.
  • Sakariya confirmed no other material reasons for his departure.
  • He held directorship in Auri Grow India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tirupati Tyres Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [TOKYOFIN] Tokyo Finance Ltd Announces FY26 Financial Results
item.description:
Tokyo Finance Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The board also noted the resignation of Company Secretary CS Ruchika Nazare, effective May 1, 2026. The financial results and auditor's report are enclosed and will be published in newspapers and on the company's website and the BSE website. The board meeting was held on April 25, 2026.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Resignation of Company Secretary CS Ruchika Nazare accepted, effective May 1, 2026.
  • Results will be published in newspapers and on the company and BSE websites.
  • Auditor's report on the audited financial results is enclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TOKYO FINANCE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TTIL] Tirupati Innovar: Bharat Sakariya Resigns as Independent Director
item.description:
Bharat Babubhai Sakariya (DIN: 10849027) has resigned from his position as an Independent Director of Tirupati Innovar Ltd, effective from the close of business hours on April 25, 2026. Sakariya cited his inability to devote sufficient time to the company's affairs as the reason for his resignation. The Board of Directors acknowledged his resignation and expressed appreciation for his contributions during his tenure. Sakariya also confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation beyond those stated.

  • Bharat Babubhai Sakariya resigned as Independent Director of Tirupati Innovar, effective April 25, 2026.
  • Resignation due to his inability to devote sufficient time to company affairs.
  • Sakariya also holds directorship in Auri Grow India Limited as an Independent Director.
  • Sakariya is a member of Audit, Nomination & Remuneration, Stakeholders Relationship, and Risk Management Committees in Auri Grow India Limited.
  • The Board of Directors placed on record its appreciation for Sakariya's contributions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tirupati Tyres Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [AWFIS] Awfis Responds to Price Movement Query
item.description:
Awfis Space Solutions Ltd clarified that the recent price movement in its securities is not attributable to any specific event or information within the company's knowledge that warrants disclosure under SEBI LODR Regulations. The company stated it is compliant with Regulation 30 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015, and has made timely disclosures of all material events. Awfis believes the price movement is driven by external market dynamics and investor sentiment.

  • Awfis confirms compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.
  • Company states no undisclosed material event impacts security prices.
  • No unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI) is pending disclosure.
  • Awfis attributes price movement to market dynamics, not internal events.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Awfis Space Solutions Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [ASTERDM] Aster DM Healthcare Board Meeting on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Aster DM Healthcare Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited standalone financial results.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited consolidated financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SBFC] SBFC Finance Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
SBFC Finance Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, following the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The approval occurred at a board meeting held on April 25, 2026. The company has also confirmed sufficient security cover for secured listed non-convertible debentures. The meeting commenced at 01:30 PM (IST) and the financial results were approved at 02:00 PM (IST).

  • SBFC Finance board approves audited financial results for FY26.
  • Audited results include unmodified audit reports from M/s. M M Nissim & Co. LLP.
  • Company confirms sufficient security cover for secured listed debentures.
  • CFO confirms unmodified audit reports on FY26 financial results.
  • Board meeting for results approval concluded at 02:00 PM (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SBFC Finance Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UBL] United Breweries: Penalty Reduced to ₹1.86 Lakh in Tax Litigation
item.description:
United Breweries Ltd. received a favorable order from the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax, Pataliputra Circle, Bihar, regarding a tax litigation. The GST Commissioner (Appeals) reduced the penalty from ₹29,00,048 to ₹1,85,878. The company will file an appeal before the GST Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT) against the residual demand.

  • United Breweries received a favorable order in a tax litigation case.
  • Penalty reduced from ₹29,00,048 to ₹1,85,878 by the Commissioner (Appeals).
  • Company to appeal residual demand before the GST Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITED BREWERIES LTD.-$ | Category: Tax & Penalty
